# Pamojanova

> Kenya's trusted digital platform for online Chama groups, Mchango campaigns, welfare groups and organizations. Powered by M-Pesa.

Pamojanova helps Kenyans pool money safely: rotating-savings Chamas, fundraising Mchango campaigns, welfare-group contributions, and verified organization donations. Every transaction is tracked, transparent, and integrated with Safaricom Paybill 4015351.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview and quick access to all features.
- [About](/about): Mission, leadership, and how Pamojanova works.
- [Browse Chamas](/chama): Public list of active Chama savings groups.
- [Browse Mchango Campaigns](/mchango): Live fundraising campaigns accepting donations.
- [Explore Mchango](/mchango/explore): Discover trending and verified campaigns.
- [Welfare Groups](/welfare): Welfare groups for shared community support funds.
- [Organizations](/organizations): Verified NGOs, churches, and institutions accepting donations.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms and conditions of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy and data handling.
